articles.title_en: How severe is Russia’s gasoline crisis? Meduza sized it up using exchange trading data.
articles.lead_en: Russia is in the grip of a gasoline crisis that developed in just a month, and there is no telling when it will end. Ukraine has continued to batter Russian infrastructure with drones, above all the country’s oil refineries.

articles.title_en: Russian gasoline is nearly 20% more expensive than a year ago and rose 6.88% in June 2026 alone as Ukrainian drone strikes choke supply

articles.title_en: Russian Regions Begin Odd-Even Gasoline Rationing
articles.lead_en: Drivers with license plates starting with an odd digit are allowed to buy gasoline on odd-numbered days of the month. Those with license plates starting with an even digit — with zero considered an even number — are restricted to even-numbered days.
articles.title_raw: Russian Regions Begin Odd-Even Gasoline Rationing

articles.title_en: ‘We have to admit there are problems and a shortage due to the strikes,’ says Deputy Prime Minister Novak on Russia’s fuel crisis
